home.metaTitle: BCP Tunisia — Engineering, installation, and technical maintenance
home.metaDescription: Technical partner in Tunisia for fire safety, electronic security, fluids, electrical, and engineering. Design, installation, commissioning, and maintenance.

hero.title: Engineering and field execution for industrial and tertiary environments.
hero.subtitle: From design through installation, commissioning, and maintenance, BCP Tunisia secures, equips, and supports your sites with a focus on reliability and long-term performance.

divisions.title: Five complementary disciplines
divisions.subtitle: Field and office teams for coherent, documented, maintainable projects.

about.title: BCP Tunisia at a glance
about.body: We work with industrial operators, tertiary asset managers, and owners who need one partner to align fire safety, fluids, electrical, and engineering—without fragmenting accountability. Our approach is pragmatic: solutions sized to risk, controlled execution, and follow-up that preserves equipment availability.

method.title: Project method
method.subtitle: A clear path from need definition to post-handover support.

audit.title: Assessment & needs
audit.body: Understanding the site, risks, and interfaces with operations.

design.title: Design & engineering
design.body: Technical choices, drawings, sizing, and specifications.

install.title: Installation
install.body: Execution, site coordination, and quality control.

commission.title: Commissioning
commission.body: Testing, acceptance, documentation, and handover to your teams.

maintain.title: Maintenance & follow-up
maintain.body: Maintenance plans, interventions, and ongoing assistance.

references.title: References
references.subtitle: Organizations that trust us with demanding environments—project details available on request.
references.marqueeAria: Scrolling strip of client reference logos

one.title: Field experience
one.body: Teams used to real operational constraints—not only paper deliverables.

two.title: Engineering & execution
two.body: Continuity from design to installation and maintenance to reduce accountability gaps.

three.title: Safety & compliance
three.body: Systems designed to be tested, maintained, and understood by operators.

four.title: Long-term support
four.body: Maintenance contracts and assistance to sustain availability after commissioning.

finalCta.title: Ready to structure your next project?
finalCta.body: Describe your context—sector, site type, urgency, and expected scope. We will qualify the request and respond with next steps.

company.metaDescription: Positioning, method, and commitment of BCP Tunisia as a technical partner for industrial and tertiary sites.
company.lead: BCP Tunisia (BE CLOSE PROTECTION) is a technical partner for industrial and tertiary environments that demand reliability, safety, and sustained performance.
company.body1: We structure our work across the full chain: understanding the need, design, installation, commissioning, and maintenance. That continuity reduces grey areas between engineering and operations and clarifies long-term responsibility.
company.body2: Our tone is deliberately sober: no unverified performance claims, no certifications displayed without formal validation. We focus on practical deliverables—technical dossiers, procedures, maintenance plans—that your teams can use every day.

values.safety: People and asset safety, without compromising system clarity.
values.quality: Execution quality and on-site control aligned with best practices.
values.continuity: Availability and maintenance to extend performance after handover.
values.clarity: Transparency on scope, interfaces, and responsibilities.

company.mediaBody: Our teams work on live sites—with the production, access, and safety constraints that entails.

servicesIndex.metaDescription: Overview of five pillars: fire, electronic security, fluids, electrical, engineering & services.
servicesIndex.lead: Five complementary domains covering critical building and process systems.

referencesPage.metaDescription: Organizations that have engaged BCP Tunisia—mission details provided on request.
referencesPage.lead: Trust is built over time. Here are organizations we serve or have served—without invented project stories.
referencesPage.note: Verify official naming and communication agreements before final publication.

projectsPage.metaDescription: Project approach and deliverables—detailed case studies only when formally approved.
projectsPage.lead: We document work for clients; public case studies are shared only after formal approval. Contact us for a sector-relevant dossier.
projectsPage.placeholder: Reserved for approved project sheets—populate with validated references.

industriesPage.metaDescription: Industry, commercial, healthcare, retail, logistics: BCP Tunisia adapts methods and teams to each context.
industriesPage.lead: Constraints vary by sector; our method stays consistent: scoping, proportionate design, controlled execution, and follow-up.
industriesPage.visualBody: Plants, headquarters, warehouses, or sensitive facilities—we align teams and deliverables with the site’s real criticality.

industry.title: Industry & manufacturing
industry.body: Production continuity, hazardous areas, utilities, and fire safety integrated with processes.

tertiary.title: Commercial & offices
tertiary.body: Fire alarm, access, HVAC comfort, and electrical for high-occupancy sites.

retail.title: Retail & large venues
retail.body: Customer flows, queue management, CCTV, and multi-site maintenance.

health.title: Healthcare & hospitality
health.body: Availability, nurse call, fire safety, and sanitary fluids.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.body: Sprinklers, detection, video, and electrical for warehouses and hubs.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.body: Critical technical systems and supervision for sensitive sites.

maintenancePage.metaDescription: Maintenance contracts, corrective interventions, and assistance for fire, security, fluids, and electrical systems.
maintenancePage.lead: Availability is decided after commissioning. We structure maintenance plans and corrective work aligned to equipment criticality.
maintenancePage.visualBody: Well-documented, maintained systems keep performance and simplify audits.

preventive.title: Preventive maintenance
preventive.body: Cadence, regulatory checks, and readings to anticipate drift.

corrective.title: Corrective maintenance
corrective.body: Diagnostics, parts, and return-to-service with actionable reports.

contract.title: Contracts & SLA
contract.body: Clear scope, response time, and escalation per your requirements.

contactPage.metaDescription: Contact BCP Tunisia for a quote, technical visit, or maintenance request.
contactPage.lead: Describe your need—we will follow up to qualify the request and propose next steps (visit, high-level study, technical proposal).
contactPage.asideBody: Phone, email, and address: to be completed before publication.

faqPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about our expertise, coverage, and how we work with clients.
faqPage.lead: Short answers on coverage, taking over legacy systems, and how we work with clients.

q1.a: Yes, with logistics adapted to location and site criticality.

q2.q: Can you take over systems installed by another contractor?
q2.a: Yes: assessment, targeted compliance work, or redesign under an agreed scope.

q3.a: Yes, with scope, cadence, and service levels defined contractually.

q4.q: How will you handle my request?
q4.a: Qualification by phone or email, a visit when needed, and a transparent technical proposal on scope.

newsPage.lead: Optional space for approved project communications, regulatory updates, or lessons learned.

brochure.title: Documentation
brochure.body: Request a PDF overview of our expertise (no oversized marketing claims).
